hero.title: SAND: Raiders of Sophie Wiki
hero.description: Build and pilot customizable Tramplers across the desert planet Sophie, scavenge ruined cities and shipwrecks, fight PvP and PvE threats, extract loot, and upgrade your walking fortress.

releaseDateAndPlatforms.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Release Date and Platforms
releaseDateAndPlatforms.intro: SAND: Raiders of Sophie launched into Steam Early Access on June 22, 2026. Use the official store links below to find the game, check pricing, or wishlist it before release on other platforms.

items.title: Steam Early Access
items.description: The Steam version is the current playable Early Access release. It includes Online PvP, Steam achievements, Family Sharing, and BattlEye anti-cheat.

items.title: Steam Launch Price
items.description: The Steam launch offer lists a 21% introductory discount ending July 6, with regional launch prices announced alongside it.

items.title: PlayStation Store
items.description: The PlayStation Store lists SAND: Raiders of Sophie as announced for PS5. It requires PS Plus for online play, supports up to 90 online players, and includes DualSense vibration.

items.title: Xbox Store
items.description: The Xbox Store lists SAND: Raiders of Sophie for Xbox Series X|S with online co-op for 2-6 players, online multiplayer for 2-90 players, Xbox achievements, and 10 supported languages.

items.title: Official Website
items.description: The official site explains the setting, Tramplers, and the core PvPvE extraction premise. It also confirms that active playtests are announced only through the official Discord.

codesAndRewards.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Codes and Rewards
codesAndRewards.intro: SAND: Raiders of Sophie rewards are tied to official platform offers and playtest participation. Use the official Steam page, website, and Discord for reward and playtest notices instead of fake key links.

items.title: Public Redeem Codes
items.description: The official Steam page, official site, and release FAQ focus on platform purchase, playtest access, and launch rewards rather than a public in-game code box.

items.title: Steam Launch Discount
items.description: The Steam store lists the base price at $24.99 and the introductory price at $19.74, with the offer ending July 6.

items.title: Server Slam Participation Reward
items.description: The official announcement states that Server Slam participants receive an exclusive weapon skin on launch after buying the game.

items.title: Server Slam #2 Access
items.description: Server Slam #2 began on June 15 and ran for 48 hours. It kept prior progress for testing, unlocked the tech tree, and wiped progress before the June 22 launch.

items.title: Safe Playtest Notice
items.description: The official website warns that fraudulent SAND playtest invitations exist and confirms that active playtests are announced only on the official Discord.

beginnerGuide.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: SAND: Raiders of Sophie is built around Tramplers, giant customizable walking bases that act as transport, storage, protection, and weapons. Learn the extraction loop before sending your first mechanical home into the desert.

steps.title: Start from the official platform
steps.description: Buy and play through Steam Early Access, or use the PlayStation and Xbox store pages for official console listings and wishlists.

steps.title: Prepare your Trampler
steps.description: Use the Trampler Editor to build from scratch or prepare a design before deploying. Designs can be saved as blueprints so a destroyed Trampler can be rebuilt.

steps.title: Choose Voyage or Storm Dive
steps.description: Use Voyage for lower-stakes exploration and Storm Dive for higher-risk, higher-reward runs with sandstorm pressure.

steps.title: Go solo or build a crew
steps.description: Enter alone or team up. Xbox lists online co-op for 2-6 players and online multiplayer for 2-90 players.

steps.title: Loot cities, ruins, and wrecks
steps.description: Scavenge the fallen planet Sophie for loot, weapons, ammo, resources, and valuable artifacts while your Trampler stores what you recover.

steps.title: Survive and extract
steps.description: Fight PvE threats, avoid or confront rival players, locate your extraction point, and leave with your loot, life, and Trampler intact.

quickTips: Save your Trampler as a blueprint before risking it on a real run.
Voyage is the safer place to learn loot routes and extraction timing.
Keep repair kits and storage space ready before pushing deeper for loot.
Watch for fraudulent playtest invites and follow only the official Discord.

tramplerBuildsAndBlueprints.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Trampler Builds and Blueprints
tramplerBuildsAndBlueprints.intro: Tramplers are the center of SAND: Raiders of Sophie. They work as transport, base, storage, defense platform, and heavy weapon system, so a planned build matters far more than an expensive one.

items.title: Blueprint-First Building
items.summary: Save your Trampler designs before risking them on Sophie.
items.description: Players can construct Tramplers from scratch in the editor and save designs as blueprints, so a creation destroyed in-game can be rebuilt instead of lost.

items.title: Core Compartment Setup
items.summary: Plan around engines, reactors, storage, spawn points, and weapons.
items.description: The Trampler editor includes core compartments such as engines, reactors, storage, spawn points, and weapons. These define how your mobile base moves, survives, stores loot, and fights.

items.title: Power, Armor, and Weapons
items.summary: Use upgrades to turn a walking base into a fighting machine.
items.description: Tramplers can be customized from interior design to upgrades for power, armor, and weapons, with mounted turrets and firepower available for fortress-style builds.

items.title: Solo-Friendly Trampler
items.summary: Keep movement, storage, and defense manageable for one player.
items.description: SAND supports solo expeditions, so compact layouts should shorten the distance between steering, storage, weapons, and essential compartments.

items.title: Crew Trampler
items.summary: Design for multiple players operating different roles.
items.description: Crew builds can spread jobs across navigation, weapons, repairs, storage, and boarding defense, instead of forcing one player to sprint through a metal maze during combat.

items.title: Heavy Fortress Build
items.summary: Stack armor, mounted weapons, and defensive compartments.
items.description: An impenetrable fortress can survive assaults, or a walking war machine can be stacked with mounted turrets and firepower for PvPvE fights and high-risk Storm Dive runs.

items.title: Stealth and Escape Build
items.summary: Use a smaller layout for fast exits and lower exposure.
items.description: Small and stealthy Tramplers are a valid build direction for getting out of danger quickly, ideal for players who prioritize looting and extracting before trouble arrives.

items.title: Maze Defense Build
items.summary: Use chaotic module placement to make boarding harder.
items.description: Chaotic module layouts can confuse and disorient boarding enemies, turning your Trampler interior into a defensive maze that slows attackers.

weaponsAndTramplerPartsTierList.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Weapons and Trampler Parts Tier List
weaponsAndTramplerPartsTierList.intro: A strong SAND loadout is not just the biggest gun bolted to a walking house, although humanity naturally tried that first. Early crews should prioritize repairs, storage, crew capacity, and reliable Trampler firepower before gambling on rare Dreadnought-only finds or high-risk experimental weapons.

entries.name: Repair Kits
entries.role: Keeps the Trampler alive during fights and long expeditions.

entries.name: Storage Compartments
entries.role: Turns the Trampler into the crew's main loot storage.
entries.detail: The Trampler acts as the crew's main base, transport, protection, weapon platform, and primary storage.

entries.name: Crew Rooms
entries.role: Lets larger crews deploy together and support heavier builds.
entries.detail: Crew size reaches up to 6 players, but large crews need enough crew rooms on the Trampler.

entries.name: Armor Plates
entries.role: Adds survivability against cannon fire, boarding, and long routes.
entries.detail: Armor Plate pricing was tuned upward, making protection a planned investment rather than disposable filler.

entries.name: Mounted Turrets
entries.role: Primary Trampler defense and pressure in large fights.
entries.detail: Trampler builds can be stacked with mounted turrets and firepower; Ironclads can drop turrets, but those drops are slightly less frequent.

entries.name: Shotgun Cannons
entries.role: Close-range defense against targets that get too near.
entries.detail: Higher-tier Shotgun Cannons have progressively better spread.

entries.name: 80 mm Mounted Cannon
entries.role: Heavy firepower for decisive cannon pressure.
entries.detail: SAND highlights the 80 mm mounted cannon as a major Trampler weapon.

entries.name: Experimental Railgun
entries.role: Power weapon for planned shots and coordinated fights.
entries.detail: Experimental Railgun reload time was increased by 0.5 seconds.

entries.name: Autocannons
entries.role: Sustained pressure when the crew needs steadier fire.
entries.detail: A launch fix addressed autocannon fire-rate limitation bypassing.

entries.name: M1866/9 Einzel Breechloader
entries.role: Rifle tied to the Server Slam launch reward skin.
entries.detail: Server Slam participants receive an exclusive skin for the M1866/9 "Einzel" Breechloader after buying the game.

entries.name: Smoke Grenade
entries.role: Escape, repositioning, and visual cover during fights.
entries.detail: Smoke Grenades spawn in stacks of 2.

entries.name: Custom Ammo
entries.role: Improves weapon flexibility when found in rare crates.
entries.detail: Custom Ammo appears more frequently in rare weapon crates.

entries.name: WOK Bomb
entries.role: Rare high-stakes explosive tied to Dreadnought runs.
entries.detail: WOK Bomb no longer spawns at regular artifact spawn locations and can only be found with a chance on the Dreadnought.

entries.name: Rare Weapons
entries.role: Valuable upgrades that depend on rare crate access.
entries.detail: Rare Weapons have a slightly smaller drop chance from rare weapon crates.

voyageAndStormDiveModes.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Voyage and Storm Dive Modes
voyageAndStormDiveModes.intro: SAND centers on two expedition styles: Voyage for lower-stakes open-world survival and Storm Dive for higher-risk, battle-royale-style extraction. Voyage is the calmer way to learn Trampler handling, loot routes, and extraction rhythm, while Storm Dive tests crews who want stronger rewards under a shrinking sandstorm.

rows.extraction: Players choose when to return to an extraction point.
rows.crew: Solo supported; crews of 2-6 with crew-size matchmaking.
rows.bestFor: New players, first Trampler builds, route learning, and low-pressure team practice.

rows.timer: Limited by the sandstorm moving toward map center
rows.extraction: Extract any time before the sandstorm reaches the center.
rows.crew: Solo and crew play supported through crew-size matchmaking.
rows.bestFor: Confident crews, PvP-focused players, and fast high-value runs.

rows.loot: Crew planning shapes layout, storage, and extraction safety.
rows.timer: Voyage has no timer; Storm Dive is storm-timed.
rows.extraction: Extraction protects loot, life, and Trampler after the run.
rows.crew: Max crew 6. Server caps: 15 Solos, 36 for 2-3, 45 for 4-6.
rows.bestFor: Planning a compact solo walker, a small-team raider, or a larger fortress.

mapLootAndExtraction.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie Map, Loot, and Extraction
mapLootAndExtraction.intro: Sophie is a massive procedurally generated world full of cities, ruins, shipwrecks, resources, weapons, artifacts, and extraction pressure. Plan each route around how much cargo your Trampler can protect and how quickly you can leave — loot greed is strongest right before the map reminds you that other players also own guns.

items.title: Start from the Trampler Editor
items.lootFocus: Storage, protection, crew rooms, and mounted firepower
items.dangerSignals: Underbuilt storage, exposed modules, not enough crew support
items.extractionMove: Enter with a Trampler that matches your crew size and loot route.

items.title: Scavenge Cities and Abandoned Streets
items.lootFocus: Weapons, ammo, resources, and valuable loot
items.dangerSignals: Smoke on the horizon, undead sounds, nearby rival scavengers
items.extractionMove: Leave once Trampler storage holds enough value to protect.

items.title: Check Ruins and Remnants
items.lootFocus: Resources, artifacts, and route value between larger POIs
items.dangerSignals: Long exposure, unclear sightlines, crew spread too far
items.extractionMove: Use ruins as controlled stops rather than endless detours.

items.title: Loot Shipwrecks Carefully
items.dangerSignals: Other crews converging, limited escape paths, distant movement
items.extractionMove: Treat shipwrecks as planned stops and keep an exit route ready.

items.title: Understand Dreadnought Risk
items.lootFocus: Special high-risk loot such as WOK Bomb chance
items.dangerSignals: PvP concentration, storm pressure, final extraction traffic
items.extractionMove: Only commit with enough firepower, repairs, and storage to justify the risk.

items.title: Extract Before the Run Turns Bad
items.mapFeature: Extraction points and final extraction areas
items.lootFocus: Securing resources, artifacts, weapons, life, and Trampler
items.dangerSignals: Damaged Trampler, low repairs, full cargo, nearby cannon fire
items.extractionMove: Voyage lets you choose when to finish; Storm Dive allows extraction before the storm hits center.

systemRequirementsAndAntiCheat.title: SAND Raiders of Sophie System Requirements and Anti-Cheat
systemRequirementsAndAntiCheat.intro: SAND is an online PvPvE extraction game, so hardware, network connection, anti-cheat, controller support, and region-linked characters all matter. Check the setup basics before blaming the desert for stutters, disconnects, or failed launches — the PC target is Windows 10/11 64-bit with broadband internet and 11 GB of storage.

checks: Intel Core i5 (8th Gen), AMD Ryzen 5 (2000 Series), or equivalent
NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650, AMD Radeon RX570, or Intel Arc A380
Intel Core i5 (13th Gen), AMD Ryzen 5 (7000 Series), or equivalent
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3080 or AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
Small-team server cap is 36 players for crews of 2-3
Large-team server cap is 45 players for crews of 4-6
Xbox lists online co-op for 2-6 and online multiplayer for 2-90 on Series X|S
The PS5 version supports DualSense vibration
Xbox Series X|S optimization and 10 supported languages are included
Install the Proton BattlEye Runtime in the Steam library before playing on Linux or Steam Deck
Server Slam #2 Linux support used the Proton BattlEye Runtime
Inventory and tech tree are tied to the character's selected region
Trampler blueprints are shared across characters
With no Tramplers and no resources to build one, recovery requires a new character or joining a team that owns a Trampler

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SAND: Raiders of Sophie

questions.question: What is SAND: Raiders of Sophie?
questions.answer: SAND: Raiders of Sophie is an open-world PvPvE extraction shooter about building and piloting customizable walking bases called Tramplers across the desert planet Sophie, scavenging loot, fighting, and extracting.

questions.question: When did SAND: Raiders of Sophie release?
questions.answer: SAND: Raiders of Sophie launched into Steam Early Access on June 22, 2026. PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S have official store listings, with the PS5 release date still to be determined.

questions.question: What platforms is SAND: Raiders of Sophie on?
questions.answer: SAND: Raiders of Sophie is playable on PC via Steam Early Access, with official PS5 and Xbox Series X|S store pages. PlayStation and Xbox list online multiplayer for 2-90 players.

questions.question: Are there redeem codes in SAND: Raiders of Sophie?
questions.answer: SAND: Raiders of Sophie has no public redeem-code system. Rewards come from the Steam launch discount and official Server Slam playtest events, not from typed codes or fake key links.

questions.question: Does SAND: Raiders of Sophie support solo and co-op play?
questions.answer: Yes. SAND: Raiders of Sophie supports solo play and crew play, with online co-op for 2-6 players and online multiplayer for 2-90 players depending on platform.

questions.question: Does SAND: Raiders of Sophie work on Linux and Steam Deck?
questions.answer: Yes. SAND: Raiders of Sophie includes Linux compatibility when you install the Proton BattlEye Runtime in the Steam library before playing on Linux or Steam Deck.

cta.title: Ready to Raid the Sands of Sophie?
cta.description: Build your Trampler, scavenge the desert, and join the SAND: Raiders of Sophie community on Discord for builds, loot routes, and updates!
